prerequisites: An active Veeqo account with access to the Employees (user) settings, where API keys are generated.
A Veeqo API key, obtained by refreshing the API key on your employee/user profile in Veeqo.
A start date (start_date) marking the earliest point from which records should be replicated.

authMethods.name: API key (x-api-key header)
authMethods.summary: Veeqo authenticates requests with an API key passed in the x-api-key request header. This maps to the connector's required api_key secret field. Generate the key from your Veeqo employee profile and treat it as a sensitive credential, since it grants full API access to your account.

setupSteps.title: Generate your Veeqo API key
setupSteps.body: Log into your Veeqo account and open the Employees page. Select your user profile (or the employee whose access you want to use) and click Refresh API Key. Veeqo generates and stores the key on that profile. Copy it for use in the connector.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key
setupSteps.body: Set the connector's api_key field to the key from your Veeqo employee profile. The connector sends it in the x-api-key header on every API request. Keep this value secret, as it grants full access to your Veeqo account.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Set the required start_date field to the earliest date from which the connector should pull records. Data created or updated on or after this date is included in the sync.
